name: ExtensionGroup_Membership
title: R5: definitional | enumerated (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Group.membership` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Group.membership` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Group.membership` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Group.membership` has a context of Group based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Group`.
Element `Group.membership` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Group.membership` has a context of Group based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Group`.
Element `Group.membership` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition:
Basis for membership in the Group:

* 'definitional': The Group.characteristics specified are both necessary and sufficient to determine membership. All entities that meet the criteria are considered to be members of the group, whether referenced by the group or not. If members are present, they are individuals that happen to be known as meeting the Group.characteristics. The list cannot be presumed to be complete.
* 'enumerated': The Group.characteristics are necessary but not sufficient to determine membership. Membership is determined by being listed as one of the Group.member.

binding.description: The basis for membership in a group
